name: GitHub pull
description: Read-only GitHub ingestion through the connection broker's api_key lane (issue #304): issues and PRs you're involved in land in the staging band as threaded messages, incremental via an updated-since cursor.
prompt: Every hour, pull the GitHub issues and pull requests I'm involved in (created, assigned, or mentioned) into the vault as threads. Follow the updated-since cursor incrementally. Read-only — never comment or change anything upstream. Stage everything for my review unless I set the connection to auto-publish.

vault.why: Stages GitHub issues/PRs into the vault's review band and tracks the incremental updated-since cursor on the pull.github connection.
